reviews.review_description:
So far, I really enjoyed the demo & it is a game that an older person may enjoy as it requires patience & time. 
So far, I would say, it is like the adult version of job simulator with a rpg twist. Maybe somewhat similar to " I expect you to die " but more rpg style.
I am just curious if the full game is entirely based in the office. If not, then it is def worth a purchase as the devs have put some serious hard work into this game by the look of it.

The point is you say what *you* want to, yet no one cares. It’s like I’m idle in hank, the most rude and annoying person in any game ever, and interesting callers who can’t hear me. Hank is the actual DJ, you just sit there. Don’t waste your time.
